content: Vite server proxy config in vite.config.ts: server: { proxy: { '/api': { target: 'http://localhost:8000', changeOrigin: true, rewrite: (path) => path.replace(/^\/api/, '') } } }. This strips /api prefix so frontend /api/resources -> backend /resources. changeOrigin: true required to spoof Host header. Frontend fetch calls use relative paths: fetch('/api/resources?team=foo'). No hardcoded port in React code.
